finding: Project-filtered Codex Desktop session views widened to limit=100 but still used the fragile 6000ms timeout budget.
change: Desktop session fetches with limit >= 100 receive a scoped minimum 10000ms timeout.
Default unfiltered limit=50 Desktop session fetches keep configured/default timeout behavior.
A regression test covers the slow project-filtered limit=100 path.

validation.command: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker-compose.example.yml -f infra/docker-compose.codex-desktop.yml up -d --build miniapp
